evidence: table lists 5 skills; skills/ directory contains 16 SKILL.md-bearing subdirectories
description: Existing Skills table lists only 5 of 16 skills in the repo as the authoritative catalog
suggested_fix: Either remove the hardcoded table in favor of a pointer to the dynamic catalog index, or regenerate it from skills/ at release time

description: Vague quantifier 'comprehensive'/'Comprehensive' used 3 times instead of concrete scope statements
suggested_fix: Replace 'comprehensive' with the specific list of scan types already enumerated in the same section

description: Vague quantifier 'relevant' used without defining the matching criteria
suggested_fix: Specify which advisory fields determine relevance (e.g. affected package match)

description: Vague quantifier 'relevant' used without defining the matching criteria
suggested_fix: Name the specific filter (own checkId/skill match) instead of 'relevant entries'

description: Vague quantifier 'robust' used to describe JSON output preference
suggested_fix: Replace with the concrete reason (e.g. 'JSON avoids fragile text parsing of CLI output')

description: CLAWSEC_ALLOW_UNSIGNED_FEED=1 disables advisory feed signature verification; documented as temporary-migration-only and fail-closed by default
suggested_fix: Emit a persistent high-visibility warning (or refuse unattended/cron execution) while the bypass env var remains set

description: HERMES_ADVISORY_ALLOW_UNSIGNED_FEED=1 disables advisory feed signature verification; documented as 'UNSAFE emergency bypass only'
suggested_fix: Emit a persistent high-visibility warning while the bypass env var remains set, same as clawsec-suite

description: --allow-unsigned-checksums degrades supply-chain verification to integrity-only (no provenance); documented as short/offline-triage-only
suggested_fix: Log a warning banner in verify_supply_chain.mjs output whenever this flag is used, separate from the pass/fail verdict line

description: Frontend/dev dependencies use caret (^) ranges rather than exact pins, allowing minor/patch drift on fresh installs
suggested_fix: Rely on the committed package-lock.json plus a CI lockfile-drift check, or pin security-sensitive deps exactly
